entry.title: BILL035(26) (Honolulu): PUBLISH → ITT
entry.content:
RELATING TO STREETS, SIDEWALKS, MALLS, AND OTHER PUBLIC PLACES.

Repeals and amends provisions governing curbside tellers.

Status: PUBLISH → ITT

Latest action: CR-202(26) Reported out for passage on third reading.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL035(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO STREETS, SIDEWALKS, MALLS, AND OTHER PUBLIC PLACES.

Repeals and amends provisions governing curbside tellers.

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL035(26) (Honolulu): ITT → CCL/PH
entry.content:
RELATING TO STREETS, SIDEWALKS, MALLS, AND OTHER PUBLIC PLACES.

Repeals and amends provisions governing curbside tellers.

Status: ITT → CCL/PH

Latest action: Committee report adopted. Bill passed second reading, public hearing closed and referred to committee.

View on the council site
